headline: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NSC) Showcases Recovery, Tech Investments, and Merger Plans
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) is one of the best railroad stocks to buy according to analysts. On March 17, Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) presented at the JPMorgan Industrials Conference 2026. Company President and CEO Mark George and Executive Vice President and CFO Jason Zampi took the opportunity to detail the company’s Q1 performance, winter storm […]
